rationale: Switched the new test to the canonical skill wrapper imports and removed the duplicated tool-module imports.
Added the explicit SkillRegistrySnapshot return type to _snapshot for clearer typing.
Pinned both helper calls to the same explicit stepId so the stop path targets the same deterministic helper container name.
Updated the disabled-mode test to assert the dispatcher omits handlers and fails with the missing-handler message that matches current disabled-mode behavior.
